supplies.title: Household Items - General Science: Grade 5
supplies.note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
• honey
• food items suggested
• spoons
• small saucepan
• plant fertilizer of your choice (only a small amount)
• water
• flowers (Term 1)
• a strainer or sieve
• 1 c dry soil
• kitchen scale
• kitchen thermometer, any stick-type tool that can be placed into hot water and soil
• oven
• oven mitt
• clock
• chair or stepladder
• stopwatch, such as found on most electronic devices
• freezer
• stove
• 1-2 c white vinegar
• 1/2-1 c baking soda
• flat surface outside to launch rocket
• 10-20' height reference, such as the side of a building, a long piece or wood, or a flagpole
• various supplies by student design
• printables
• optional: barometer
• optional: computer
